case_title: ASHLEY NADER ET AL VS. SIENNA BURKS

docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 09/29/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED AUG-22-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BURKS, SIENNA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,650.00 FILED BY NADER, ASHLEY COHEN, YARDEN AS TO DEFENDANT BURKS, SIENNA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-28-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-28-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAITNIFFS ASHLEY NADER AND YARDIN COHEN ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT SIENNA BURKS IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NADER, ASHLEY COHEN, YARDEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BURKS, SIENNA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
